description_long: This is a freestanding electric oven with a smooth, flat cooktop featuring four circular heating elements. The front face includes a large, dark glass oven door with a prominent horizontal handle, and a lower drawer for storage or warming. The control panel is positioned above the oven door and is equipped with four round knobs and a central rectangular display or window, all set in a metallic frame. The sides and back of the oven are plain, with a consistent metallic finish and minimal detailing. The oven's overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a slightly reflective surface. No visible brand markings or ventilation features are present.
description: A modern, metallic electric oven with a glass-fronted door, four-burner cooktop, and a control panel with knobs and a display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass oven door, horizontal handle, lower drawer, and control panel with four knobs and a central display.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain metallic side panel and the cooktop's edge with visible heating elements.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless metallic back with a small rectangular panel at the bottom left.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain metallic surface and the cooktop's edge visible.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located above the oven door and features four evenly spaced, round knobs, likely for controlling the cooktop burners. In the center is a rectangular display or window, possibly for digital readouts or status indicators. The panel is metallic and has a clean, uncluttered layout with no visible buttons or touchscreens. No labeling or text is visible on the controls.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a thick, horizontal bar mounted across the upper portion of the oven door. It appears to be made of metal with a smooth, rounded profile and is slightly protruding for easy grip. The design is simple and ergonomic, with no decorative elements.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large, rectangular window is set into the oven door, occupying most of its central area.
